name: ComponentPreview
visual_summary: A component preview shows a block of a webpage or a website component in a box with a title.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: ComponentPreview
Description: A component preview shows a block of a webpage or a website component in a box with a title.
Style: minimal
Interactions: clickable
Tags: component, preview, Astro

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ComponentPreview.astro
---
interface Props {
  src: string
  title: string
  dark?: boolean
  index?: number
  wrapper?: string
}

const { src, title, dark = false, index = 1, wrapper = '' } = Astro.props
---

<component-preview data-src={src} class="block">
  <iframe
    data-preview="true"
    {src}
    {title}
    class:list={[
      wrapper,
      dark ? 'bg-gray-900' : 'bg-white',
      'mx-auto w-full ring ring-gray-200 transition-[max-width] duration-300 data-[preview=fa
